extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primoz caught CORT Magnus in final 75-100 meters of steep uphill finish, gaining 21 seconds on GC rivals through time bonuses and gaps.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIC waited until final moment to go to front, gained 21 seconds via bonuses plus gaps in final 200m.
Movistar used ERVITI early on category 2 climb positioning, keeping LOPEZ and MAS powder dry until finish climb.
CORT Magnus solo breakaway survival strategy nearly worked, caught only 75-100m from line after long solo effort.
MAS Enrique only GC rival within shouting distance of ROGLIC on steep finish, indicating climbing hierarchy established.

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: Devastating acceleration final 50m gained 3s on MAS plus 4s bonus, recovered within minutes showing superiority.
rider_signals.MAS Enrique: positive: Only GC contender matching ROGLIC on steep finish, established as main challenger despite losing 7s total.
rider_signals.CORT Magnus: positive: Breakaway mastery nearly succeeded, held off peloton until 75-100m despite being alone on final climb.
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: neutral: Third on stage but 3 seconds behind ROGLIC, Movistar keeping him protected until finale.
rider_signals.EIKING Odd Christian: neutral: Retained red jersey with over 2-minute advantage despite not featuring in finale.
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: neutral: Positioned well on category 2 climb by VAN BAARLE but did not contest finish.
